description_long: This is a heavily weathered, rectangular metal toolbox with a rusty, mottled green and brown exterior. The top surface features a large, faded white stencil or painted image of a human face, partially obscured by rust and grime, with some text visible above and below the image. The front side is equipped with a prominent, corroded metal latch and a thick, semi-circular handle, both showing significant signs of age and use. The sides and back are plain, with the left side displaying a sturdy, fixed metal handle for carrying. The box's surface is rough and pitted, with patches of oxidation and discoloration throughout. The overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to the elements for a long period, giving it a rugged, utilitarian character suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A rusted, rectangular metal toolbox with a faded face graphic on top, a corroded latch, and a thick metal handle. The surface is mottled green and brown, showing heavy weathering and age.
description_view_0: Front view shows the latch mechanism, thick metal handle, and the faded face graphic on the top surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the fixed, semi-circular metal handle and the weathered, rusty surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, corroded back with no visible handles or latches, and the continuation of the face graphic on top.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the box's side with some stenciled numbers and letters, and the end of the handle visible.
attribute_handle_type: Thick, semi-circular fixed metal handle on the left side, made of corroded steel, with a utilitarian, non-ergonomic design.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Front-mounted, corroded steel clasp latch, rectangular in shape, with no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal compartments, trays, or dividers are visible; the box appears to be a single large compartment.
attribute_external_labeling: Large, faded white face graphic with partial text on the top surface
Stenciled numbers and letters on the right side
